validate.notes: Docker build successful. NOP test: reward=0 (6 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit). Gold test: reward=1 (all 16 tests pass after gold fix applied). Rubric judge skipped - requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for LLM evaluation; rubric rules are informational coding conventions from CLAUDE.md that gold solution already follows.

ci_commands_discovered: bunx tsc --noEmit - TypeScript typecheck from package.json
ci_commands_skipped: bun lint (oxlint) - oxlint.json has incompatible rule 'no-undef-init' for this oxlint version
zig fmt --check - Zig compiler not available in container
prettier - requires npm packages not installed in container
clang-format - requires LLVM toolchain not available
bun test - requires building bun binary with Zig/WebKit toolchain
tests_added: test_repo_ban_words - validates no banned patterns (std.debug.assert, usingnamespace, etc.) in codebase
test_repo_typecheck - validates TypeScript code compiles without errors
p2p_enrichment.notes: Bun repo CI/CD primarily requires full Zig compiler + WebKit/JSC + CMake toolchain to build and run tests. Added ban-words and typecheck tests which run without needing the full build toolchain.
